questions.question: What is the highest peak of Mont Blanc?
expected_answers: Mont Blanc's summit is 4,810 meters above sea level.
Mont Blanc stands at an elevation of 4,810 meters above sea level.
The summit of Mont Blanc stands at 4,810 meters above sea level.
Mont Blanc reaches a height of 4,810 meters above sea level at its summit.
Mont Blanc’s highest point sits 4,810 meters above sea level.
